creator: _jkrow
caption:
Just when I thought I knew all the coolest spots in New York, I find out there’s a private heart shaped island in the Hudson Valley with two Frank Lloyd Wright houses on it 😅

📍 Petra Island, Lake Mahopac, New York 
🛥️ @petraislandtours 

🗺️ Follow for more places that make you question how they’ve managed to stay under the radar

geo_locations: Petra Island, Lake Mahopac, New York
pinned_places: Petra Island, Lake Mahopac, New York

transcription.text: Less than 3,000 people have ever visited this private, heart-shaped island in New York. This is Petra Island on Lake Mayapak, about an hour north of New York City, and on the island is the Massaro House, a home built from original Frank Lloyd Wright drawings from the 1940s. The house is literally built into the rock along the shoreline, with massive overhangs above the water and huge windows facing the lake from basically every angle. You get there by boat and get to walk around, and there's actually two Frank Lloyd Wright houses on this island. The second one is a smaller Charuti Cottage, which was designed by Frank Lloyd Wright himself in the 1950s. I like that it doesn't feel like some sort of formal museum tour. You're able to freely walk through the homes, sit by the water, and wander around this private island that barely anyone has ever seen before. The island is still privately owned by the same family, but they're starting to open it up for public tours, homeless retreats, private events, and even limited overnight stays.
